mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exchange_order (order_no, user_id, item_id, item_name, points_cost, verify_code, status, create_time) VALUES (#{order_no}, #{user_id}, #{item_id}, #{item_name}, #{points_cost}, #{verify_code}, 0, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM exchange_order WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT o.*, u.nickname, u.phone FROM exchange_order o LEFT JOIN user u ON o.user_id = u.id
AND o.status = #{status}
AND (o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR o.verify_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
